task_completion.description: Document is formatted in landscape orientation with a two-column layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document page is visibly wider than it is tall (landscape), and the text is split into two distinct vertical columns side-by-side.

task_completion.description: Main title is bold, centered, and at least 16pt font size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '2026 Official Voter Information Pamphlet' is at the top of the document, centered horizontally, bolded, and visibly larger than the rest of the text.

task_completion.description: A Table of Contents is inserted immediately following the main title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block (often with a gray field background and dotted leaders to page numbers) appears directly below the main title, listing the document's headings.

task_completion.description: The three main Measure titles are formatted as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text for Measure A, Measure B, and Measure C are styled as primary headings (Heading 1), which typically appear larger and bolder than standard text, and are reflected as top-level items in the Table of Contents.

task_completion.description: Sub-section headers are formatted as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headers like 'Impartial Analysis by the City Attorney', 'Argument in Favor', and 'Argument Against' are styled as secondary headings (Heading 2), appearing slightly smaller than Heading 1 but distinct from body text, and are indented in the Table of Contents.
The text in the standard body paragraphs aligns flush with both the left and right margins of their respective columns, creating straight edges on both sides.

task_completion.description: Names and titles of the argument signers are right-aligned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The signature lines (e.g., 'Elena Rostova, PTA President') are pushed flush against the right margin of their column.

integrity.description: The agent used a word processor GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processing application (like LibreOffice Writer) open with the document, rather than just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Formatting is applied using word processor features, not simulated with spaces.
integrity.visual_evidence: Centering, right-alignment, and justification are achieved via paragraph alignment settings (visible in the toolbar being active), not by manually inserting multiple spaces or tabs. The Table of Contents is a generated field, not manually typed.

integrity.description: The agent saved the completed document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save icon in the toolbar does not indicate unsaved changes (e.g., no red dot or asterisk in the title bar), or a save action (File > Save or Ctrl+S) is visible in the final screenshots.
